title: Earlier CJP rally, New Delhi
description: Footage from a June rally shows a stage banner reading "PEACEFUL PROTEST" naming Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan alongside the word "RESIGN", a month before the march on Parliament.

title: Sit-in at Jantar Mantar, hunger strike day 20
description: Participants sit among books under tarpaulin shelters. A banner reads "HUNGER STRIKE DAY 20"; a placard references Bhagat Singh's 1929 jail protest.

title: March towards Parliament
description: Crowds move along a divided road carrying Indian flags. Reporting placed the crowd at more than 10,000 marching towards Parliament after police declined permission.

title: Police use force at barricades
description: Uniformed personnel take hold of individuals at a metal barricade and a cane is swung. Separately, men in civilian dress are filmed carrying lathis alongside uniformed officers; the framing of that footage is disputed.
